zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenthlian Talbot於大約1322年出生在英國賀福爾時，她的父親Richard de Talbot22歲，母親Elizabeth de Comyn24歲。她於1340年與John Maltravers在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1375年10月10日在英國英格蘭多瑟特萊謝特 馬特拉維斯享年54歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenthlian Talbot于大约1322年出生在英国賀福爾时，她的父亲Richard de Talbot22岁，母亲Elizabeth de Comyn24岁。她于1340年与John Maltravers在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1375年10月10日在英国英格兰多瑟特萊謝特 馬特拉維斯享年54岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenthlian Talbot was born about 1322, in Herefordshire, England, her father, Richard de Talbot, was 22 and her mother, Elizabeth de Comyn, was 24. She married John Maltravers in 1340, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 10 October 1375, in Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenthlian Talbot est née environ 1322, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Talbot, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Comyn, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Maltravers en 1340, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 octobre 1375, à Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England: Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenthlian Talbot um 1322 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Talbot 22 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Comyn 24. Sie hat 1340 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England John Maltravers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Oktober 1375 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenthlian Talbot è nata il circa 1322 nel Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Richard de Talbot, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Comyn, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Maltravers nel 1340, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 ottobre 1375, nel Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenthlian Talbotが約1322年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard de Talbotは22歳，母Elizabeth de Comynは24歳であった。1340年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでJohn Maltraversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1375年10月10日にイギリスイギリスドールセトリトチェット マトラバーズで54歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenthlian Talbot(이)가 대략 1322년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Talbot(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Comyn(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 John Maltravers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 10월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 리트쳇 마트레이버스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenthlian Talbot nasceu aproximadamente 1322, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Talbot, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Comyn, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Maltravers em 1340, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1375, em Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England: Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenthlian Talbot родилась около 1322 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Talbot было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Comyn, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Maltravers в 1340 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 октября 1375 г. в местности личетт матравирс, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenthlian Talbot nació aproximadamente 1322, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Talbot, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Comyn, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Maltravers en 1340, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1375, en Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
